case_title: ZHI XIU HUANG VS. PENINSULA SEAFOOD RESTAURANT INC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2014 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO FEB-11-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO BRING HER OWN CANTONESE INTERPRETER. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER---AMY LO. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOYCE WONG - OWNER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED.
